headline: Bernstein Lifts American Tower to Outperform With $207 Price Target. Time to Buy the Tower REITs?
summary: Tower REITs picked up a fresh vote of confidence from Wall Street this morning. American Tower (NYSE:AMT) was upgraded by Bernstein to Outperform with a $207 price target, sending shares of the wireless infrastructure giant higher in early trading. The call lands as the broader tower REIT group, including Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) and SBA Communications ... Bernstein Lifts American Tower to Outperform With $207 Price Target. Time to Buy the Tower REITs?
